title: Interstellar plankton
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Interstellar plankton''' were tiny pseudo-animals and quasi-plants that formed the food source of the [[Oswaft]] and other space-borne cratures in the [[ThonBoka]] Starcave.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]'' {{1st}} {{1stID|Interstellar plankton}}
